qa_pairs.question: How are users invited to a Globus group, and what happens after they are invited?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can be invited to a Globus group by either entering an email address (which is the preferred method) or by searching for their username. Once the users have been selected, click the 'Add' button, and they will receive an email inviting them to join the group. After they accept the invitation, they will become visible within the group.

qa_pairs.question: What are the different roles available for users in a Globus group, and how can these be modified?
qa_pairs.answer: In a Globus group, you can assign users one of three roles: Admin, Manager, or Member. An Admin has full access, a Manager can change user roles, and a Member has no management functions. To modify a user's membership, click on their name, adjust their role and status, and then click the 'Save Changes' button to apply the updates.
